items.name: Chicken Trio
items.description: Chicken Bryan, Pollo Rosa Maria & Chicken Marsala, served with your choice of a side.

items.name: The Johnny Trio
items.description: Tuscan-grilled sirloin Marsala, Chicken Bryan & Mezzaluna.

items.name: Carrabba’s Italian Classics Trio
items.description: Chicken Parmesan, Lasagne & Fettuccine Alfredo.

items.name: Chicken Parmesan
items.description: Coated with Mama Mandola’s breadcrumbs, sautéed and topped with pomodoro sauce, parmesan, romano and mozzarella cheese.

items.name: Chicken Piccata
items.description: Thin, tender cutlets of chicken lightly dusted with flour, sautéed and topped with lemon butter sauce, parsley and capers.

items.name: Tuscan-Grilled Chicken
items.description: Wood-grilled and seasoned with Mr. C’s Grill Baste, olive oil and herbs.

items.name: Chicken Marsala
items.description: Wood-grilled and topped with mushrooms and our Lombardo Marsala wine sauce.

items.name: Pollo Rosa Maria
items.description: Wood-grilled chicken stuffed with fontina cheese and prosciutto, topped with mushrooms and our basil lemon butter sauce.

items.name: Chicken Bryan
items.description: Wood-grilled and topped with goat cheese, sun-dried tomatoes, basil and our lemon butter sauce.

items.name: Eggplant Parmesan
items.description: Layers of sliced eggplant coated with seasoned breadcrumbs and topped with pomodoro sauce, parmesan, romano and mozzarella cheese.

items.name: Spicy Sicilian Butter
items.description: A spicy butter topping.

items.name: Marsala Sauce
items.description: Mushrooms and our Lombardo Marsala wine sauce.

items.name: Ardente Topping
items.description: Tomatoes, garlic, basil and melted gorgonzola cheese.

items.name: Bryan Topping
items.description: Goat cheese, sun-dried tomatoes, basil and lemon butter sauce.

items.name: Tuscan-Grilled Sirloin
items.description: Tuscan-grilled sirloin steak.

items.name: Tuscan-Grilled Filet
items.description: Tuscan-grilled filet (barrel cut).

items.name: Tuscan-Grilled Ribeye
items.description: Tuscan-grilled ribeye.

items.name: Tuscan-Grilled Pork Chop
items.description: Tuscan-grilled pork chop (one or two chops).

items.name: Premium Flavored Lemonades
items.description: Strawberry or Raspberry.

items.name: Flavored Iced Tea of the Day
items.description: Gold Peak iced tea flavored with one of our favorites (ask server for today’s options).

items.name: Soft Drinks
items.description: Coke, Diet Coke, Sprite, Hi-C, Dr Pepper, Minute Maid Lemonade.

items.name: Freshly Brewed Iced Tea
items.description: Gold Peak Tea (fresh brewed) and Iced Tea.

items.name: Italian Bottled Water
items.description: Acqua Panna Still or San Pellegrino Sparkling.

items.name: Coffees
items.description: Coffee, Cappuccino, Espresso, Caffè Latte.

items.name: Sogno Di Cioccolata (Chocolate Dream)
items.description: A rich fudge brownie with chocolate mousse, fresh whipped cream and chocolate sauce.

items.name: Strawberry Cheesecake
items.description: Creamy New York-style cheesecake topped with strawberry purée.

items.name: Tiramisù
items.description: Lady fingers dipped in liqueur-laced espresso, layered with sweetened mascarpone, Myers’s Rum and chocolate shavings.

items.name: John Cole
items.description: Vanilla ice cream with caramel sauce and roasted cinnamon rum pecans.

items.name: Cannoli Cake for Two
items.description: Vanilla cake with layers of cannoli filling, topped with a mini cannoli, pistachios and chocolate sauce, with a chocolate chip crust.
